channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🌍 Global conflict displacements hit record 32.3 million in 2025
item.description: Internal displacements from violence and conflict reached an all-time high in 2025, surpassing disaster-driven displacements for the first time. Iran and DR Congo accounted for two-thirds of all conflict-driven displacements.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK sends warship, jets and drones for Strait of Hormuz mission
item.description: The UK pledged drones, fighter jets and a warship to a 40-nation mission to safeguard shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. HMS Dragon will join the defensive operation as Iran continues to control the vital waterway.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia carried out covert strikes on Iran during war
item.description: Saudi Arabia launched unpublicized strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on the kingdom during the Middle East war, then engaged in intensive diplomatic contact with Tehran to de-escalate, officials said.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Dali ship operator charged over deadly Baltimore bridge collapse
item.description: Federal prosecutors filed criminal charges against Synergy Marine over the 2024 Key Bridge collapse that killed six workers. Maryland also reached a $2.25 billion civil settlement with the company.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Kevin Warsh confirmed to Fed Board ahead of chair vote
item.description: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh to the Federal Reserve Board 51-45, with one Democrat joining Republicans. A separate vote on his appointment as Fed chair is expected Wednesday before Jerome Powell's term ends Friday.

item.title: 🛡️ US allies surpassed American military purchasing power in 2025, new report shows
item.description: A new defense analysis reveals that US allies have collectively surpassed American military budget purchasing power, though Washington remains the single highest spender in absolute terms.

item.title: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy claims vast expansion in its definition of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran Revolutionary Guard Corps navy has declared a tenfold increase in what it considers the Strait of Hormuz, raising questions about enforcement amid ongoing tensions.

item.title: ☢️ Russia plans to deploy Sarmat ICBM operationally later this year
item.description: Moscow announced plans for operational deployment of the Sarmat intercontinental ballistic missile after claiming a successful test, despite years of technical issues and delays.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinas yuan hits three-year high days before Xi-Trump summit
item.description: The Chinese currency has reached its strongest level in three years as markets position ahead of the highly anticipated Trump-Xi meeting in Beijing.

item.title: 🚀 Trump Golden Dome missile shield estimated to cost $1.2 trillion over 20 years
item.description: A nonpartisan federal agency estimates that building and maintaining a national missile defense system would cost $1.2 trillion over two decades.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇮🇱 EU Sanctions Hamas Leaders and Israeli Settler Organizations
item.description: European Union foreign ministers unanimously agreed to sanction Hamas leaders and Israeli settler groups including Amana, Nachala, and Regavim over West Bank violence and Gaza devastation.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Keir Starmer Faces Deep Political Peril After Surviving Resignation Calls
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer remains under intense pressure despite surviving calls for his resignation, as internal Labour divisions and policy controversies continue to mount.

item.title: 🌍 Global Conflict Displacements Hit Record High in 2025
item.description: Internal displacements caused by violence and conflict reached record levels in 2025, driven by wars in Ukraine, Sudan, Gaza, and other conflicts worldwide.

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US Inflation Jumps to 3.8% as Iran War Drives Energy Costs Higher
item.description: US consumer prices rose 3.8% annually as the Iran conflict disrupted oil supplies and pushed energy costs higher, complicating Federal Reserve policy decisions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Sent Iron Dome Batteries and Personnel to UAE
item.description: US Ambassador Mike Huckabee revealed that Israel deployed Iron Dome anti-missile batteries and personnel to the UAE, calling on Gulf states to "pick a side" in the war between Israel and Iran.

item.title: 🇷🇸 Serbia Hosts First Joint Military Exercise With NATO
item.description: Serbia conducted its first joint military drills with NATO, less than 30 years after the alliance bombed Belgrade during the Kosovo war, marking a significant shift in Belgrade's foreign policy alignment.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Kevin Warsh Confirmed to Federal Reserve Board in Close Senate Vote
item.description: The US Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh to the Federal Reserve Board in a narrow vote, with Democratic Senator John Fetterman joining Republicans to advance the nomination.

item.title: ⚖️ Dali Ship Operator Charged Over Deadly Baltimore Bridge Collapse
item.description: Six construction workers were killed when the cargo ship Dali crashed into the Francis Scott Key Bridge. The ship's operator now faces federal charges over the incident.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia covertly struck Iran during US-Iran war, sources say
item.description: Saudi Arabia conducted undisclosed strikes against Iran during the ongoing conflict, marking a shift from its traditional diplomatic stance as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China presses Pakistan to deepen Iran mediation ahead of Trump-Xi talks
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi highlighted Strait of Hormuz security and regional stability as Middle East tensions loom over this week's Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU expresses frustration over failed defense industry ramp-up
item.description: EU top diplomat Kaja Kallas voiced frustration over the bloc's slow defense production pace, drawing contrast with Ukraine's rapid industrial growth amid the Russia war.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦 US Weapons Stockpile Depletion Raises Concerns for Ukraine Aid
item.description: Weeks of conflict with Iran have depleted critical US weapons stocks, leading European allies to question the viability of American support for Ukraine as the war stretches Pentagon supplies.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇦🇪 Iran Rhetoric Targets UAE as Gulf State Faces Growing Pressure
item.description: Iran has escalated its war messaging against the United Arab Emirates, viewing the Gulf state with suspicion due to its close ties with the United States and Israel amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine Strikes Russian Gas Facilities After Deadly Moscow Attacks
item.description: Ukraine targeted distant Russian gas infrastructure in retaliation for Russian attacks that killed at least six people, escalating the energy war between the two nations.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK pledges jets, drones and warship for Hormuz defence mission
item.description: The UK announced it will contribute Typhoon jets, mine-hunting drones and HMS Dragon destroyer to a 40-nation mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz. Defence Minister John Healey said the mission would begin when conditions allow, with £115m in new funding.
